title.en: The Omer Period: Why 33 Days of Semi-Mourning?
title.zh: 俄梅珥计数期：为什么是33天的半哀悼期？
title.he: ספירת העומר: מדוע ל"ג יום של אבלות חלקית?

headerImage.description: Ancient scroll with Hebrew text surrounded by wheat stalks, symbolizing the Omer counting period, with a subtle overlay of 33 tally marks transitioning from dark to light tones
